description: Multi-mode brick-chart strategy with seven entry engines, structural risk management, daily limits, and optional filters.

entryModes.label: ABC
entryModes.summary: Trend continuation after impulse leg (A), counter-trend pullback (B), and resumption (C).

entryModes.label: Pullback Continuation
entryModes.summary: Lean trend plus small pullback, then resume in trend direction.

entryModes.label: N-Brick Reversal
entryModes.summary: Enter on the flip after N consecutive same-direction bricks.

entryModes.label: Market Structure Break (BOS)
entryModes.summary: Enter on break of structure through confirmed swing pivots.

entryModes.label: Consolidation Breakout
entryModes.summary: Enter on breakout from a tight consolidation box.

entryModes.label: Three-Brick Thrust
entryModes.summary: Enter on momentum thrust after consecutive same-direction bricks.

entryModes.label: Double Top / Bottom
entryModes.summary: Enter on neckline break after equal swing highs or lows.

properties.name: Default Quantity
properties.purpose: Number of contracts or shares per entry.

properties.name: Take Longs
properties.purpose: Allow long entries.

properties.name: Take Shorts
properties.purpose: Allow short entries.

properties.name: Entry Mode
properties.purpose: Selects which pattern engine Hydra uses to find trades.

properties.name: Leg A Min Bars
properties.purpose: Minimum bars or bricks in the initial trend leg (A).

properties.name: Leg B Min Bars
properties.purpose: Minimum bars in the counter-trend pullback (B).

properties.name: Leg B Max Bars
properties.purpose: Maximum bars allowed in the counter-trend pullback (B).

properties.name: Leg C Min Bars
properties.purpose: Bars of resumption (C) required before entry.

properties.name: Leg C Max Bars
properties.purpose: Only enter while the C run is at or below this many bars; avoids chasing.

properties.name: Use Retrace Filter
properties.purpose: Require Leg B retracement of Leg A to fall within the min/max percentage band.

properties.name: Min Retrace %
properties.purpose: Leg B must retrace at least this percentage of Leg A.

properties.name: Max Retrace %
properties.purpose: Leg B must retrace no more than this percentage of Leg A. Keep below 100 to preserve a valid ABC.

properties.name: Trend Bars
properties.purpose: Minimum trend bricks or bars before the pullback.

properties.name: Max Trend Bars
properties.purpose: Skip setups if the trend leg exceeds this length; avoids chasing exhausted trends.

properties.name: Min Pullback Bars
properties.purpose: Minimum counter-trend bars in the pullback.

properties.name: Max Pullback Bars
properties.purpose: Maximum counter-trend bars in the pullback.

properties.name: Resume Bars
properties.purpose: Bars of resumption in the trend direction required before entry.

properties.name: Pullback Target Multiplier
properties.purpose: When Use Structural Target is on: target = trend-leg (A) size × this multiplier, projected from entry.

properties.name: Reversal Brick Count
properties.purpose: Consecutive same-direction bricks or bars required before the flip entry.

properties.name: Reversal Max Brick Count
properties.purpose: Only take the flip while the exhausted run is at or below this count; skips over-extended runs.

properties.name: Reversal Min Run (Ticks)
properties.purpose: The exhausted run must span at least this many ticks to count as real exhaustion.

properties.name: Reversal Target Multiplier
properties.purpose: When Use Structural Target is on: target = exhausted-run size × this multiplier, projected from entry.

properties.name: Swing Strength (Bars)
properties.purpose: Counter-move in bricks or bars needed to confirm a swing pivot. 1 = every reversal is a pivot.

properties.name: Break Buffer (Ticks)
properties.purpose: Require price to close this many ticks beyond the swing level to confirm a break.

properties.name: Min Swing Size (Ticks)
properties.purpose: Skip the break unless swing range (pivot high to pivot low) is at least this many ticks.

properties.name: Target Multiplier
properties.purpose: When Use Structural Target is on: measured-move target = swing range × this, beyond the break level.

properties.name: Box Lookback (Bars)
properties.purpose: Number of bars defining the consolidation range.

properties.name: Box Max Height (Ticks)
properties.purpose: Range only counts as a box if high-to-low height is at or below this many ticks.

properties.name: Box Target Multiplier
properties.purpose: Profit target = box height × this multiplier (measured move).

properties.name: Box Min Height (Ticks)
properties.purpose: Range only counts as a box if height is at least this many ticks; skips ultra-tight noise.

properties.name: Box Break Buffer (Ticks)
properties.purpose: Require price to close this many ticks beyond the box edge to confirm breakout.

properties.name: Thrust Bricks
properties.purpose: Consecutive same-direction bricks or bars (after an opposite bar) that define a momentum thrust.

properties.name: Thrust Exact Count
properties.purpose: True = fire only on exactly Thrust Bricks (fresh ignition). False = fire on Thrust Bricks or more consecutive bars.

properties.name: Thrust Min Size (Ticks)
properties.purpose: The thrust run must span at least this many ticks to qualify.

properties.name: Thrust Target Multiplier
properties.purpose: When Use Structural Target is on: target = thrust size × this, projected from entry.

properties.name: Swing Strength (Bars)
properties.purpose: Counter-move needed to confirm a swing pivot. 1 = every reversal is a pivot.

properties.name: Equality Tolerance (Ticks)
properties.purpose: Two swing lows or highs count as equal if within this many ticks.

properties.name: Break Buffer (Ticks)
properties.purpose: Require price to close this many ticks beyond the neckline to confirm the break.

properties.name: Min Pattern Height (Ticks)
properties.purpose: Neckline-to-extremes height must be at least this many ticks; skips shallow patterns.

properties.name: Target Multiplier
properties.purpose: When Use Structural Target is on: measured-move target = pattern height × this, beyond the neckline.

properties.name: Use Time Window
properties.purpose: Restrict entries to a daily time range using chart or session time.

properties.name: Start Hour
properties.purpose: Hour when the trading window opens.

properties.name: Start Minute
properties.purpose: Minute when the trading window opens.

properties.name: End Hour
properties.purpose: Hour when the trading window closes.

properties.name: End Minute
properties.purpose: Minute when the trading window closes.

properties.name: Profit Target (Ticks)
properties.purpose: Fixed take-profit distance in ticks; used when structural target is off or as fallback.

properties.name: Stop Loss (Ticks)
properties.purpose: Fixed stop distance when structural stop is off or invalid.

properties.name: Use Structural Target
properties.purpose: Target the pattern's structural level instead of fixed ticks.

properties.name: Structural Target Buffer (Ticks)
properties.purpose: Take profit this many ticks before the structural target level.

properties.name: Use Structural Stop
properties.purpose: Place the stop just beyond the Leg B extreme instead of a fixed tick distance.

properties.name: Structural Stop Buffer (Ticks)
properties.purpose: Extra ticks beyond the Leg B extreme for the structural stop.

properties.name: Use Custom Trail Stop
properties.purpose: Enable Hydra's built-in trailing stop logic.

properties.name: Custom Trail Distance (Ticks)
properties.purpose: Trail distance behind the favorable extreme once trailing is active.

properties.name: Custom Trail Activation (Ticks)
properties.purpose: Require this many ticks of favorable movement before trailing begins.

properties.name: Breakeven Profit (Currency)
properties.purpose: Move stop to breakeven when unrealized profit reaches this dollar amount.

properties.name: Use Max Daily Profit
properties.purpose: Enable a daily profit cap in account currency.

properties.name: Max Daily Profit ($)
properties.purpose: Daily profit cap amount.

properties.name: Use Max Daily Loss
properties.purpose: Enable a daily loss cap in account currency.

properties.name: Max Daily Loss ($)
properties.purpose: Daily loss cap amount.

properties.name: End day on unrealized profit?
properties.purpose: When daily limits are hit, include open-trade unrealized P&L, close the current trade, and halt for the day.

properties.name: Use Tiered Profit Lock
properties.purpose: Dynamically raise the daily loss floor as realized profit accumulates.

properties.name: Tier 1 Profit Threshold ($)
properties.purpose: When realized profit reaches this amount, the daily loss floor moves to Tier 1 Floor.

properties.name: Tier 1 Floor ($)
properties.purpose: Daily loss floor once Tier 1 is reached. 0 = breakeven; negative values allow a small drawdown from peak.

properties.name: Tier 2 Profit Threshold ($)
properties.purpose: When realized profit reaches this amount, the daily loss floor moves to Tier 2 Floor.

properties.name: Tier 2 Floor ($)
properties.purpose: Daily loss floor once Tier 2 is reached.

properties.name: Tier 3 Profit Threshold ($)
properties.purpose: When realized profit reaches this amount, the daily loss floor moves to Tier 3 Floor.

properties.name: Tier 3 Floor ($)
properties.purpose: Daily loss floor once Tier 3 is reached.

properties.name: Use Max Daily Losses
properties.purpose: Halt trading after N consecutive losing trades in the same day.

properties.name: Max Daily Losses
properties.purpose: Number of losing trades before the day is halted.

properties.name: Use Max Daily Trades
properties.purpose: Cap total entries per calendar day.

properties.name: Max Daily Trades
properties.purpose: Maximum entries allowed per calendar day.

properties.name: Enable Quick Exit
properties.purpose: Exit open trades after a set number of bars if conditions are met.

properties.name: Quick Exit Bars
properties.purpose: Bars after entry before quick exit is evaluated.

properties.name: Quick Exit Only In Profit
properties.purpose: Only quick-exit when the trade is in profit.

properties.name: Enable Choppiness Filter
properties.purpose: Block entries when the market is too choppy (Choppiness Index).

properties.name: Choppiness Period
properties.purpose: Lookback period for the Choppiness Index.

properties.name: Choppiness Threshold
properties.purpose: Entries blocked when choppiness is above this level.

properties.name: Use Minimum Volume Filter
properties.purpose: Require minimum bar volume before entry.

properties.name: Minimum Volume
properties.purpose: Minimum bar volume required for entry.

properties.name: Use RSI Filter
properties.purpose: Filter or optionally reverse entries based on RSI extremes.

properties.name: RSI Period
properties.purpose: RSI lookback period.

properties.name: RSI Overbought
properties.purpose: RSI level considered overbought.

properties.name: RSI Oversold
properties.purpose: RSI level considered oversold.

properties.name: Reverse on RSI Extremes
properties.purpose: When enabled, RSI extremes can flip trade direction instead of blocking.

properties.name: Use Momentum Filter
properties.notes: Recommended off for NBrickReversal and DoubleTopBottom modes.
properties.purpose: Require price above or below EMA and a closing bar in trade direction.

properties.name: Momentum EMA Fast
properties.purpose: Fast EMA period for the momentum filter.

properties.name: Require Bullish/Bearish Bar
properties.purpose: Longs require close > open; shorts require close < open.

properties.name: Use Market Regime Filter
properties.purpose: Master switch for regime-based trade permission using FluxTrade Market Regime.

properties.name: Trade UpTrend High Vol
properties.purpose: Allow trades in uptrend plus high volatility.

properties.name: Trade UpTrend Low Vol
properties.purpose: Allow trades in uptrend plus low volatility.

properties.name: Trade Sideways High Vol
properties.purpose: Allow trades in sideways market plus high volatility.

properties.name: Trade Sideways Low Vol
properties.purpose: Allow trades in sideways market plus low volatility.

properties.name: Trade DownTrend High Vol
properties.purpose: Allow trades in downtrend plus high volatility.

properties.name: Trade DownTrend Low Vol
properties.purpose: Allow trades in downtrend plus low volatility.

properties.name: Use High Impact Event Filter
properties.purpose: Filter entries based on scheduled high-impact economic events.

properties.name: Min High Impact Events
properties.purpose: Minimum high-impact events in the lookback window.

properties.name: Max High Impact Events
properties.purpose: Maximum high-impact events in the lookback window.

notes: Mode-specific parameter groups only apply when the matching Entry Mode is selected.
null max values indicate no upper bound enforced by NinjaTrader Range attribute (int.MaxValue).
MinHighImpactEvents and MaxHighImpactEvents have no Range attribute in source code.
Tier floor properties accept negative values to allow a small drawdown from peak profit.
